description.purpose: Match spoken words to printed words

olenepal.strings:
Match sounds with Words /*new string*/ Hello! Today we are going to learn about matching words with sounds on a farm trip. Let’s get to know about the farm! /*new string*/ The farm is full of exciting animals, beautiful fields full of vegetables and fruits. /*new string*/ Let’s go to the farm! /*new string*/ Click on the objects starting with letter A. /*new string*/ Click on the sound icon to hear the sound. /*new string*/ Click on the objects starting with letter B. /*new string*/ Click on the objects starting with letter C. /*new string*/ Click on the objects starting with letter D. /*new string*/ Click on the objects starting with letter E. /*new string*/ Click on the objects starting with letter F. /*new string*/ You did it! Let’s try another word /*new string*/ Listen and Repeat /*new string*/ Can you guess what word it is? /*new string*/ Could you help us look for them? /*new string*/ Hi again! There are some things
missing in the farm. /*new string*/ Read and listen to the word click on the sound you hear. /*new string*/ bee /*new string*/ corn /*new string*/ bull /*new string*/ dog /*new string*/ apple /*new string*/ donkey /*new string*/ eagle /*new string*/ cow /*new string*/ ant /*new string*/ eagle /*new string*/ egg /*new string*/ flower /*new string*/ frog/*new string*/ EE EA What word do you hear? Congratulations! You have completed the matching game. Play Again ______ a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z
